implementation_log: Updated `strategy-improve-report` in `src/tw_quant/runner.py` so missing-history threshold breaches on individual sampled dates are converted into stdout warnings plus skipped-date manifest records, while the workflow continues processing later dates. Kept `daily-selection` behavior unchanged by centralizing threshold message formatting and only altering the strategy-improve path. Added regression coverage for warning/skip/continue behavior in `tests/test_tw_quant_runner_strategy_improve_report.py` and updated stdout JSON parsing in tests to tolerate warning lines before the final JSON payload.
summary: T21 implementation is complete and ready for QA.
next_action: Send the implementation and test evidence to QA.
